---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Caspar Leung"
date: "2026-03-05"
output: html_document
---


```{r initialization}
library(ggplot2)

# Read the file skipping the first 2 rows
df <- read.csv("multiTimeline.csv", skip = 2, header = TRUE)

# Rename columns
colnames(df) <- c("Time", "Interest")

df$Time <- substr(df$Time, 1, 19)
df$Time <- as.POSIXct(df$Time, format="%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S")

# Check the first few rows
head(df)
```

```{r}
#histogram distribution of search interest
ggplot(df, aes(x = Interest)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 15, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of BTS Search Interest",
    subtitle = "Frequency of interest scores across the recorded period",
    x = "Interest Score (0-100)",
    y = "Frequency"
  )

```

```{r}
bts_ts <- ts(df$Interest, frequency = 180, start = 18/24) #it starts at 1800 so start = 18/24

plot(bts_ts, 
     main = "BTS Search Interest (TS Object)", 
     ylab = "", 
     xlab = "Time (Fraction of Day)")
```



```{r}
#Residual Plot

# Calculate the Trend (2-hour window = 15 points)
df$Trend <- as.numeric(stats::filter(df$Interest, rep(1/15, 15), sides = 2))

# Calculate the Residuals (Raw Data minus the Trend)
df$Residuals <- df$Interest - df$Trend


ggplot(df, aes(x = Time, y = Residuals)) +
  #"Zero Line"
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
  #
  geom_point(color = "darkblue", alpha = 0.6) +
  #
  geom_segment(aes(x=Time, xend=Time, y=0, yend=Residuals), color="gray80") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Time Series Residual Plot (BTS Interest)",
    subtitle = "Spikes above/below the red line represent 'Unexplained' activity",
    x = "Time of Day",
    y = "Residual Value"
  )

```



```{r}
#ACF PACF plot
#par(mfrow=c(1,2)) 
#acf(df$Interest, main="ACF ")
#pacf(df$Interest, main="PACF ")
#par(mfrow=c(1,1)) 

```
